2197590.name: Karos - Cool Pack
2197590.description:
The Cool pack contains a variety of useful items. With this kit, you will be able to expand your potential and gain more experience, thanks to a wide variety of products from the store.


Please remember that you can only buy the Starter pack once.

The pack contains:


  • Golden Bear of the Guardian (eternal) Increases the speed of movement and gives an increase to the experience gained by 15%
  • VIP status (30 days) Gives an increase of 10% to HP and MP. Activates the work of Magic Stones for armor and weapons.
  • Luxury leather bag for 30 days An elite leather bag for 30 days will change your life for the better! Gives 32 additional slots in the inventory.

    You can get the purchased set in the "Gifts" menu of the in-game store.
2197590.supported_languages:
俄语*, 德语*, 土耳其语*, 英语, 法语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
